top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Sinks 3% as Fed-Hike Wagers Lift Yields: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street’s historic weekly run is poised to come to a halt, with stocks and bonds falling after a solid jobs report added to speculation the Federal Reserve’s next interest-rate move will be a hike.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Falls 3% as Rotation Out of Tech Stocks Continues
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500’s longest weekly winning streak in four decades was stopped on Friday by the same cohort that’s powered the index’s yearlong advance — technology megacaps.
